attorneys.name: GALE, BENJAMIN WINSOR
attorneys.address: 4302 REDWOOD HIGHWAY, STE. 100, SAN RAFAEL, CA 94903, 415-492-9800

calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Benjamin Gale for (executor) Dexter Wong.

The Court stated that we are here on a petition for final distribution, that it relies on a disclaimer, that it was not on a presumptive time frame, that there was no delay caused by the timing of the disclaimer, that the court is not aware of any objections and that there was a question raised by the declaration regarding the disclaimer. Mr. Gale stated that it was miscommunication between himself and the executor. The Court stated that it could be a reason to adjust the fees. The Court granted the report of status of administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
